channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Flight recorders recovered in DCA crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) said Thursday that they recovered flight data recorders, known as black boxes, from the aircraft involved in the deadly mid-air collision near Reagan Washington National Airport earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Growing anger in Greece over deadly rail disaster prompts plan by opposition to challenge government
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — Three Greek opposition parties vowed Friday to challenge the country’s center-right government with a censure motion over its handling of a deadly rail disaster nearly two years ago.
item.dc:creator: DEREK GATOPOULOS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: DC plane crash: What to know about the mistakes made leading up to the fatal collision
item.description: As the National Transportation Safety Board investigates the fatal midair collision that left 67 dead, details are emerging about mistakes and failures leading up to the crash.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boats return to the Potomac River for DC plane crash recovery and investigation
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Police boats returned to the Potomac River on Friday as part of the recovery and investigation after a midair collision killed 67 people in the United States' deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday said he plans to follow through on Saturday on his threat to impose 25 percent tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Congress authorized more flights at Reagan National despite warnings
item.description: Congress added more flights to Reagan National's schedule last year despite warnings from the airport.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, KRON4

item.title: What to know about the NTSB and the investigation into the DC plane crash
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people brought renewed focus on the federal agency charged with investigating aviation disasters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mushers and dogs braved a horrific Alaska winter to deliver lifesaving serum 100 years ago
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The Alaska Gold Rush town of Nome faced a bleak winter. It was hundreds of miles from anywhere, cut off by the frozen sea and unrelenting blizzards, and under siege from a contagious disease known as the “strangling angel” for the way it suffocated children.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Olympian Nancy Kerrigan mourns loss of skating community members after DC plane crash
item.description: “Much like everyone here has been saying is not sure how to process it,” she told MSNBC while in tears on Thursday at the Boston Skating Club.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Big Oil wants a lot from Trump. It has an ally in Doug Burgum, the president's Interior pick
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — When North Dakota's petroleum association was going to hold a banquet honoring top fracking executives last year, it turned to Gov. Doug Burgum.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO and JACK DURA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KTLA 5

item.title: Republicans leave Florida frustrated with lack of final plan to pass Trump agenda
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) arrived at this week’s House Republican retreat with hopes of uniting the fractious GOP conference around a plan to pass President Trump's agenda — but instead, the group is departing south Florida with rising tensions in its ranks. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans advance Trump OMB nominee as Democrats boycott vote
item.description: Senate Republicans advanced the nomination of Russell Vought to lead the White House budget office as Democrats boycotted the meeting to protest the administration's recent efforts to freeze large swaths of federal funding.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Aviation attorney discusses likely lawsuit against government, American Airlines filed by victims' families
item.description: An aviation attorney told Fox News Digital he expects the families of the victims of Wednesday's midair collision will file lawsuits in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A police officer testifies that an ex-prosecutor never obstructed her in the Ahmaud Arbery case
item.description: BRUNSWICK, Ga. (AP) — The case against a former Georgia district attorney charged with discouraging police from arresting the man who killed Ahmaud Arbery in 2020 took a blow Thursday as a police supervisor testified that the accused prosecutor never obstructed her during the investigation.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Aviation expert weighs in on how aircraft crash near DC may have happened
item.description: An aviation expert told Nexstar's WDCW that the altitude of both the passenger plane and Army helicopter may have played a principal role in the aircraft collision near Reagan National Airport (DCA).
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Florida AG reduces pool contractor judgment from $1.9 million to $60 grand
item.description: This is after the attorney general spent years investigating the companies after complaints of dozens of unfinished swimming pools.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Behnken, NewsNation

item.title: DC crash: Timeline of Black Hawk-plane collision
item.description: Planes are once again taking off and landing at Reagan Washington Airport as things get back to normal amid an anything-but-normal situation.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: What we know about the DC plane crash victims
item.description: Among those killed were figure skaters, union members, and a couple en route to visit their child at college.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, KRON4

item.title: Trump blames DEI for weakening FAA in aftermath of Reagan National plane crash
item.description: President Trump on Thursday appeared to blame diversity initiatives at the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for weakening safety following a deadly midair collision near Reagan National Airport.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: In ‘2000 Meters to Andriivka,’ Oscar winner takes viewers back to Ukraine’s front lines
item.description: PARK CITY, Utah (AP) — The day Mstyslav Chernov won the BAFTA for his documentary “20 Days in Mariupol” was the day he learned two soldiers he knew had been killed in combat.
item.dc:creator: LINDSEY BAHR, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump holds briefing on plane crash near DC, suggests DEI programs contributed
item.description: President Donald Trump held a briefing Thursday morning on the deadly collision between an American Airlines plane and a military helicopter over the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Watch live: Gabbard makes case to lead national intelligence at confirmation hearing
item.description: Former Hawaii Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (D-Hawaii) is testifying Thursday morning before the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence to make her case as President Trump's pick for director of national intelligence.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: DC plane crash disaster: Crew chief, 1 pilot of doomed Army Black Hawk helicopter identified
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth calls the deadly aircraft collision involving a Black Hawk and a civilian airliner "a tragedy" in a statement obtained exclusively by Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: Asteroid samples fetched by NASA hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world..
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: No survivors after collision between American Airlines jet, Army helicopter near DC
item.description: Everyone aboard an American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members that collided with an Army helicopter was feared dead in what was likely to be the worst U.S. aviation disaster in almost a quarter century, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, ABC 4

item.title: Video shows DC plane crash involving American Airlines flight, Black Hawk helicopter
item.description: The collision of an airplane and a military helicopter was caught on video -- there was a fiery explosion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Air Florida flight one of deadliest plane crashes in US history
item.description: An American Airlines jet with 60 passengers and four crew members aboard collided Wednesday with an Army helicopter while coming in for a landing at Ronald Reagan National Airport near Washington and multiple people were killed.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Figure skaters among those on flight that collided with Army helicopter
item.description: U.S. Figure Skating released a statement saying athletes, coaches, and family members were on their way home from the National Development Camp held in conjunction with the U.S. Figure Skating Championship in Kansas when the collision happened.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, KTLA 5

item.title: A food bank netted a huge haul of 13,000 fresh salmon. The catch? The fish were still alive
item.description: AUBURN, N.Y. (AP) — A New York food bank was offered a huge donation of fresh fish this month — but it came with a catch.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL HILL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Passenger jet with 64 aboard collides with Army helicopter while landing at Reagan Airport near DC
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — An American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members collided Wednesday with an Army helicopter while landing at Ronald Reagan National Airport near Washington, prompting a large search-and-rescue operation in the nearby Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Video captures fiery crash between American Airlines flight and Army Blackhawk
item.description: Editor's note: The video may appear graphic to some viewers. (NEXSTAR) - Images from the EarthCam video service captured images of what appears to be the fiery crash of an American Airlines jet over the Potomac River Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, KTLA 5

item.title: Regional jet carrying 64, military helicopter on training flight collide near Reagan National Airport
item.description: A regional jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members collided with a military helicopter on Wednesday night as it approached Washington Reagan National Airport. The flight was en route from Wichita, Kan., to Washington, D.C., American Airlines said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Elvia Limon, KRON4

item.title: President Trump signs the Laken Riley Act
item.description: The grieving family of Laken Riley stood behind President Trump as he signed a law named after their late daughter.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Brandt, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Honda recalls more than 290,000 vehicles over possible engine issue
item.description: An error in the fuel injection electronic control unit could lead to the engine stalling or a loss os power.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, Fox 5
